violations.text: Refrigerator door gasket of the 1-door glass reach-in on the service line observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. In addition, the wash solution is unable to be dispensed at the 3-bay sink. The tubing/connection that leads to the container leaks a large amount of water when button is used to dispense wash solution. Tubing/connection must be properly repaired in order to dispense wash solution. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The ceiling above the 3-bay sink and in the dish room is in poor repair. Paint is chipped and peeling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The doors to the outside, located to the side of the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings observed around the perimeter of the storage room and dish room. No foods/food equipment observed to be contaminated. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Areas of droppings are to be properly cleaned in order to observe new activity and increase pest control as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024
The ceiling above the 3-bay sink and in the dish room is chipping/peeling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Excessive, unnecessary, and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the storage room. Establishments shall be kept free of excessive, unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity to consistently maintain temperatures of 41 DF or below, due to the lack of air circulation. Establishment is to obtain more refrigeration. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The following outer openings must be repaired. -The door to the outside, located on the side of the cafeteria , is not tight-fitting. -A hole where the pipes are located was observed in the wall of the storage room. -The vent to the outside located in the storage room was observed with feathers and leaves in it, allowing harborage conditions. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment is to repair door, hole, and vent. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The following equipment was observed in poor repair. -The can opener blade -The walk-in cooler -The walk-in freezer Equipment must be in good repair and proper adjustment. Can opener blade was replaced at the time of inspection. Per PIC, new walk-in cooler is being delivered. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to get thermo labels. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Establishment must put an air gap at the food prep sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the storage room area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024
The ceiling paint over the 3-bay sink was observed chipping and in poor repair. The ceiling must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (commercial mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by a small amount of droppings observed around the perimeter of kitchen/storage room. No food or food equipment observed to be affected. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Areas of droppings are to be thoroughly cleaned in order to monitor for new activity. Pest control is to be increased as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

Per interview of staff, the water at the 3-bay sink is brown until the faucet runs for a couple of minutes. Dishwasher is to be used to wash, rinse, and sanitize. If necessary, dishwasher is to be used to wash and rinse, and 2-bay sink set-up to sanitize. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by a small area of droppings observed next to the 2-bay sink. No food products/equipment observed to be affected. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. School does have active pest control. Area is to be cleaned in order to see if there is new activity. Increased pest control service if new activity is observed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the gaskets in several refrigeration units have an accumulation of black residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023

Water at the 3-bay sink observed to be brown. Per interview, the water needs to run for a couple of minutes to be clean. All remaining plumbing/sinks are functioning properly. Dishwasher is to be used to wash, rinse, and sanitize. If needed, dishwasher will be used to wash and rinse and sanitizer set-up at the 2-bay sink until plumbing is repaired at the 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The ceiling in the storage room and small hallway is in poor repair. Paint is peeling in sections directly above food storage/milk cooler. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Ceiling in these areas must be scraped and resurfaced using proper materials in order to prevent physical contamination of foods. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

Chicken observed with a temperature of 130 degrees Fahrenheit in Cambro unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chicken reheated and held at proper temperature. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023

A couple of small flies observed in the kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Pest control is to be contacted to treat and eliminate this issue. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023
Can opener is not in good repair. Area above the blade observed to be peeling and blade beginning to rust. Can opener is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
Cambro units are not in good repair. Gaskets of the Cambro units do not make a tight seal. Units must be properly repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

Water at the 3-bay sink observed to be brown. Per interview, the water needs to run for a couple of minutes to be clean. All remaining plumbing/sinks are functioning properly. Dishwasher is to be used to wash, rinse, and sanitize. If needed, dishwasher will be used to wash and rinse and sanitizer set-up at the 2-bay sink until plumbing is repaired at the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2023

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights above the service line. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
